text: If you are a .jpeg, we still see you, and we love you.

Some say Football, others call it Soccer🤔 .. 

But for me? It's always been about the feeling! 🔥 
From the crowd, to the energy and moments that we will never forget.. You're coming with me to experience it all with @adobe this weekend in Tampa at the Premier League Mornings Live! April 18th and 19th at Armature Works.🌴

Can I count you IN?⬇️ 
#adobepartner #myplmorning

I retired from soccer 10 months ago after 23 years in the game.

I thought I was done, but the game wasn’t done with me; and neither was the story.

Proud to partner with @adobe; the official creative partner of the Premier League, for Premier League Mornings Live in Tampa on April 18th and 19th.

Adobe merch, live games and the beautiful game; all in one place. 

#adobepartner

I've been creating content for over a decade — music videos, commercials, brand campaigns. But I recently found a free course through Adobe Digital Academy that genuinely changed how I think about reaching audiences.

"Multichannel Content Marketing" on @adobe YouTube channel taught me strategies I didn't even know I was missing: how to create content that works across platforms, build a consistent message, and actually connect with people wherever they are.

The best part? Adobe Digital Academy has learning paths for everyone:

▸ Free tutorials on YouTube

▸ Professional certificates and courses on Coursera

▸ Quick practical lessons on LinkedIn Learning (free through 5/31!)

No experience needed. Whether you're just getting started or you've been doing this for years, there's a path for you.

The best investment you can make is in yourself. Link in bio to explore Adobe Digital Academy and start learning for free today.
